arts.ttl: Five players who could join Liverpool in January
arts.sum: Feyenoord star Anis Hadj-Moussa - who did not play under Slot but was presumably signed with his approval - has recently been mooted as a target for Liverpool after his standout performance against Man City in the Champions League earlier in the season. The right-back position is one Liverpool need to think long and hard about due to Trent Alexander-Arnold's contract situation.

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist names the Premier League star Liverpool should sign if Mohamed Salah leaves this summer - with the Egyptian still yet to sign a new contract
arts.sum: Salah's contract expires in the summer and the Egyptian is yet to extend his deal, with speculation over his future currently a major talking point.

arts.sum: Both Virgil van Dijk and Mo Salah have just a number of months remaining on their respective Liverpool deals and the two stars appear to be in very different situations at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Manchester City on alert as Martin Zubimendi now open to leaving Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Over the last 2-3 years, Martin Zubimendi has regularly been linked with a move away from Real Sociedad. The closest that came to becoming a reality was last summer when Liverpool came calling, but in the end, he opted to remain at his boyhood club. However, the situation appears to have changed.
